title: Meeting Scheduling Priority Rules
content:
# Meeting Scheduling Rules

## Priority Ranking
1. Client meetings > Internal reviews > Tech sharing sessions
2. Cross-department meetings > Intra-department meetings
3. Meetings with external participants cannot be moved

## Conflict Resolution Principles
- Prioritize keeping higher-priority meetings
- Tech sharing sessions can be postponed to another time during the same week
- If security meetings conflict with client meetings, postpone the security meeting but it must be rescheduled within 24 hours
- No individual should attend more than 3 consecutive hours of meetings
author: Admin Department
